revenueModel.citizenAccess: Free for private citizens and law enforcement globally, with tax returns and tax calculations handled under the ClearMyNumbers pricing and beta rules
revenueModel.commercialTrial: Commercial and institutional recipients receive a 30-day review window from the moment the case or certified output reaches them before paid commercial release rules apply
revenueModel.institutionalLicensing: Annual license for banks, insurers, regulators, aviation, mining, energy, and government entities
revenueModel.fraudRecovery: 20% of recovered value for eligible commercial or institutional recoveries
revenueModel.taxReturns: ClearMyNumbers tax returns and tax calculations launch in a 30-day supervised free beta. After beta, private citizens pay 50% of the lowest comparable local accountant cost in their geographical area. Businesses move onto paid tax-return pricing under the commercial release rules.
revenueModel.forensicProcessing: Per certified output for sealed reports, hash anchoring, blockchain anchoring, and court-ready bundles
revenueModel.transactionCertification: Per transaction certification for high-value contracts, M&A, tenders, and fuel supply agreements
revenueModel.apiAccess: Usage-based plus base license for banks, auditors, legaltech, and compliance engines
revenueModel.escalationSupport: Case-based pricing for institutional notices, regulatory briefs, and human-rights escalation packs
revenueModel.sovereignDeployments: Custom licensing plus oversight agreement with no logic modification permitted

taxReturnModule.launchPurpose: Let private citizens, businesses, and support teams iron out filing headaches before payment enforcement begins
notes: Private citizens remain constitutionally protected from exploitative tax pricing.
Business tax work becomes paid work after the release beta and follows commercial release rules.
The beta window exists to stabilise bank accounts, payment rails, and filing edge cases before charging starts.
